name: Ambiguous issuer binding
description: Two attestations share action_ref + subject + (claim_type, evidenceType) but differ in source_provider_did and disagree on the verdict. The four-tuple cannot select an authoritative issuer. A conforming verifier MUST reject — no injective (claim_type, evidenceType, source_provider_did) binding exists.
note: C1 discrimination-tuple injectivity boundary: (claim_type, evidenceType, source_provider_did) must uniquely bind a verdict to an issuer. Same action_ref with two issuers and disjoint verdicts is the non-injective case the boundary exists to reject.
